body.purpose: Most UI copy and helper text.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Decisive primary action in Heritage Gold, used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{appearance:none;border:0;border-radius:12px;padding:8px 20px;min-height:44px;background:oklch(var(--accent));color:oklch(var(--surface-3));font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,Noto Sans,Apple Color Emoji,Segoe UI Emoji;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.25;transition:background-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:oklch(var(--accent-hover));}.ds-btn-primary:active{background:oklch(var(--accent-active));transform:translateY(0.5px);}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:2px solid oklch(var(--focus));outline-offset:2px;}

components.name: Field (Text / Select)
components.description: Paper field with precise border and calm focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field{width:100%;min-height:44px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid oklch(var(--border-4));background:oklch(var(--surface-1));color:oklch(var(--ink));font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,Noto Sans,Apple Color Emoji,Segoe UI Emoji;font-size:14px;line-height:1.25;outline:none;transition:border-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);}.ds-field:focus-visible{border-color:oklch(var(--focus));box-shadow:0 0 0 2px oklch(var(--focus-ring));}

components.name: Quiet Button
components.css: .ds-btn-quiet{appearance:none;border-radius:12px;padding:8px 12px;min-height:40px;border:1px solid oklch(var(--border-4));background:transparent;color:oklch(var(--ink));font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,Noto Sans,Apple Color Emoji,Segoe UI Emoji;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;line-height:1.25;transition:background-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);}.ds-btn-quiet:hover{background:oklch(var(--surface-5));}.ds-btn-quiet:focus-visible{outline:2px solid oklch(var(--focus));outline-offset:2px;}

components.name: Danger Button
components.css: .ds-btn-danger{appearance:none;border-radius:12px;padding:8px 12px;min-height:40px;border:1px solid oklch(var(--danger-border));background:transparent;color:oklch(var(--danger-ink));font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,Noto Sans,Apple Color Emoji,Segoe UI Emoji;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;line-height:1.25;transition:background-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);}.ds-btn-danger:hover{background:oklch(var(--danger-soft));}.ds-btn-danger:focus-visible{outline:2px solid oklch(var(--focus));outline-offset:2px;}

narrative.overview:
Dashboardy's product UI is a workshop for careful decisions: clean surfaces, quiet structure, and deliberate emphasis. It should feel premium through restraint, not ornament, and remain readable under pressure without turning into a 'starter kit' dashboard.

This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS template aesthetics, neon-on-black 'crypto dashboard' styling, and spreadsheet-dense intimidation. It reduces cognitive load before adding features, and makes scope, access, and freshness easy to trust.
keyCharacteristics: Rounded geometry that reads modern, not playful.
Clear states (hover, focus, disabled) that stay calm.
Heritage Gold accent — warm, confident, and deliberately scarce.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: The Heritage Gold accent exists to signal decisive action and focus states. If a screen feels 'gold-heavy', the rule is being broken. Use it sparingly — restraint is luxury.

rules.name: The Quiet Kicker Rule
rules.body: Uppercased labels should set context, not compete with the title. Keep them small and muted.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If you need a shadow to make the UI understandable, the spacing and surface steps are wrong.

dos: Do use surface steps before borders to create hierarchy (surfaces first, lines second).
Do keep the Heritage Gold accent rare, and spend it on primary actions and focus states.
Do show destructive actions as quiet but unmistakable (danger ink + border, no theatrics).
Do keep copy short and operational, optimizing for repeat use and fast scanning.
Do let the warm gold accent pop against the cool neutral surfaces for a premium feel.
donts: Don't drift into generic SaaS template aesthetics and 'dashboard starter kit' sameness.
Don't use neon-on-black, high-chroma 'crypto dashboard' styling.
Don't ship spreadsheet-dense, intimidating screens that force cognition before context.
Don't overuse the gold — it earns its impact through scarcity.
